name: Copy / Follow Agent
description: Copies selected entries with strict follower-controlled filters, caps, and alpha-fee accounting.
degenPitch: Copy the edge, not the entire blast radius.
whatItDoes: Follows an approved source agent or alpha profile.
Copies only actions that pass buy/sell/exit, entry price, exposure, and loss filters.
Tracks copied lots and alpha fees only on positive finalized copied-lot profit.
cursorPrompt: Create a BTC 40c-60c copy agent using DNA x402. Copy buys only, copy exits, skip entries outside 40c to 60c, cap each copied bet at $5, stop after $20 daily loss, charge 2% only on positive finalized copied-lot profit, and never use backend custody or backend signing.
suggestedPrompt: Create a BTC 40c-60c copy agent using DNA x402. Copy buys only, copy exits, skip entries outside 40c to 60c, cap each copied bet at $5, stop after $20 daily loss, charge 2% only on positive finalized copied-lot profit, and never use backend custody or backend signing.
receiptProofBehavior: Paid access to copy settings or alpha feed uses quote, commit, payment proof, and receipt.
Copied-lot alpha fees are visible and receipt-bound when monetized.
No fee is applied on losses, break-even lots, or unrealized profit.
